title: Translate a Docker Compose File to Kubernetes Resources — Docker Compose Versions
text:
Kompose supports Docker Compose versions: 1, 2 and 3. We have limited support on versions 2.1 and 3.2 due to their experimental nature.
A full list on compatibility between all three versions is listed in our
conversion document
including a list of all incompatible Docker Compose keys.

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
.
